subject: [RFC PATCH 10/45] mm: page_alloc: support superpageblock resize for memory hotplug

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch adds support for resizing superpageblocks when memory is hotplugged. It introduces a new function, resize_zone_superpageblocks(), which allocates a new superpageblock array covering the full zone span and copies existing superpageblocks. This ensures that pages in newly added regions participate in anti-fragmentation steering. The patch also adds a flag to track whether superpageblocks were allocated using kvmalloc for hotplug memory. ZONE_DEVICE is excluded from this feature as device pages should not be subject to anti-fragmentation steering.
